name: axtella-erp-suit
description: Root orchestration for Bahrain suite plus Axtella ZATCA backend scaffold.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix "bahrain-suite/apps/backend" install && npm --prefix "bahrain-suite/apps/frontend" install && npm --prefix "bahrain-suite/apps/mobile" install && npm --prefix "axtella-backend-zatca" install
scripts.bootstrap:bahrain-auth: npm --prefix "bahrain-suite/apps/backend" run db:check && npm --prefix "bahrain-suite/apps/backend" run db:migrate && npm --prefix "bahrain-suite/apps/backend" run db:seed-dev-user
scripts.check:bahrain-login: node -e "const base='http://127.0.0.1:3000'; const email=process.env.BAHRAIN_DEV_EMAIL||'dev@example.com'; const password=process.env.BAHRAIN_DEV_PASSWORD||'AxtellaDev2024!'; const run=async()=>{const h=await fetch(base+'/api/v1/health'); if(!h.ok) throw new Error('health failed '+h.status); const r=await fetch(base+'/api/v1/health/ready'); if(!r.ok) throw new Error('ready failed '+r.status); const l=await fetch(base+'/api/v1/auth/login',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,password})}); if(!l.ok) throw new Error('login failed '+l.status+' '+await l.text()); const data=await l.json(); if(!data.access_token) throw new Error('access_token missing'); console.log('Bahrain auth check passed for', email);}; run().catch((e)=>{console.error(e.message); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -n BAHRAIN_API,BAHRAIN_WEB,AXTELLA_API -c green,blue,magenta "npm run dev:bahrain-backend" "npm run dev:bahrain-frontend" "npm run dev:axtella-backend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:bahrain-backend && npm run build:bahrain-frontend && npm run build:bahrain-mobile && npm run build:axtella-backend
scripts.health:paths: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const paths=['bahrain-suite/apps/backend/package.json','bahrain-suite/apps/frontend/package.json','bahrain-suite/apps/mobile/package.json','axtella-backend-zatca/package.json']; const missing=paths.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing paths:\n'+missing.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('All expected app package.json files are present.');"
